storyInfo: Hoshiguma has only just returned to Mitsukue in Higashi and she is already being chased by the police. In order to avoid them, she barges into Momoka Hanyuu's performance, but thanks to a series of mishaps, she finds herself having become a 'vicious Oni' or 'ghost' right out of a kaidan tale.

attributes.content: No, Madame Oni! I can't let you go any further!
attributes.name: Jirou

attributes.content: I have to kill that man.
attributes.name: 'Oni'

attributes.content: The oyabun told me himself, I can't let you get any closer!
attributes.name: Jirou

attributes.content: There's no time... Out of the way, Jirou. Last warning.
attributes.name: 'Oni'

attributes.content: Madame Oni!!!
attributes.name: Jirou

attributes.content: Even you're getting in my way now, Jirou?
attributes.name: 'Oni'

attributes.content: I know I can't. I just want one last drink with you, okay?
attributes.name: Jirou

attributes.content: I'm not trying to buy time, just... just one drink. When we're done, we can get back to killing each other.
attributes.name: Jirou

attributes.content: The yakuza pulls out a bottle of sake and pours two cups, while the woman known as 'Madame Oni' silently watches on.
Drink already.
attributes.name: Jirou

attributes.content: Madame Oni lifts her head, the sake falling straight into her belly, but rather than a gentle warmth, a raging fire burns in her like a twisted knife.
Jirou! You—!
attributes.name: 'Oni'

attributes.content: I've got to protect him.
attributes.name: Jirou

attributes.content: He might be your enemy, but he's always been good to me.
attributes.name: Jirou

attributes.content: If he dies here, he's only going to be my benefactor. If he lives, he'll become the benefactor for all of Mitsukue. Sorry, Madame Oni.
attributes.name: Jirou

attributes.content: GRAAAAAAAAAAAH!!!
attributes.name: 'Oni'

attributes.content: The pain in her belly becomes a raging inferno that churns together with the fury in her mind, bursting its way out of her chest.

Unlike the chivalrous yakuza who walked against the flow, who knew right from wrong and believed in the justice she had always upheld, now, she has devolved into a vicious Oni, one who knows nothing but slaughter.

The Hannya in her hands can no longer be controlled by the great wisdom in scripture it is named for. All that is left is a frenzied fury that burns hotter than the face of Hannya, uncaring of former friendships.
Hyaaah!
attributes.name: 'Oni'

attributes.content: Madame Oni?!
attributes.name: Yakuza A

attributes.content: Gugh!
attributes.name: Yakuza A

attributes.content: Stop her—
attributes.name: Yakuza B

attributes.content: Whoa!
attributes.name: Yakuza B

attributes.content: S-She's gone mad—
attributes.name: Yakuza C

attributes.content: All who get in my way... must die.
attributes.name: 'Oni'

attributes.content: Time, transformation, the general welfare...
attributes.name: Diet Candidate

attributes.content: These words must ring hollow to you. Belaboring the subject would not bring you redemption...
attributes.name: Diet Candidate

attributes.content: Vicious Oni.
attributes.name: Diet Candidate

attributes.content: Shut up...
attributes.name: 'Oni'

attributes.content: SHUT UPPPPPPP!!!
attributes.name: 'Oni'

attributes.text: Like A Yakuza: Birth of the Vicious Oni

attributes.content: Excuse me.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No pushing! Are you trying to flatten everyone or something?
attributes.name: Young Fan

attributes.content: That giant uchiwa you've got, lift it up high!
attributes.name: Young Fan

attributes.content: Uchiwa?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Y'know, a fan you wave to show how big a fan you are. Isn't that board you got there a real big one? Making it a triangle's pretty creative. How long has Momo-cchi been your oshi?
attributes.name: Young Fan

attributes.content: Momo-cchi?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...Sorry, just trying to get through. I'm in a hurry.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka! Momoka! Momoka!
attributes.name: Hyped Audience

attributes.content: Thank you everyone! Thank you so much!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I am so honored that my first role on the big screen got to be the leading lady in Birth of the Vicious Oni—the Nameless Oni!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I've always been fascinated by the Nameless Oni, as she's the subject of a kaidan tale that's been going around Mitsukue for ages.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: An Oni with a single horn who rebels in the name of vengeance, wiping out an entire yakuza family in a berserk rage, before finally killing the candidate for the Diet she swore a blood feud against.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Blood feud?)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But after realizing just how bloodstained her hands had become, she couldn't bear the guilt, ultimately committing suicide.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Suicide?)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Her endless resentment meant she couldn't be reborn, so she became a specter roaming the streets. Vowing to bury the truth in the dark, she suffers no witness to live...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Has the story really grown that much...?)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's a terrifying and tragic story, but it's also a touching one. And now, it's finally out on the silver screen for all to see!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: This movie means a lot to me. The people of Kajimachi were so kind to me when we were filming there, so I'd like to thank them while I have the chance.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'd also like to take this opportunity to talk about Shin Onibugyou, coming out this winter!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'll be playing the lead Onihappou-no-Take, giving everyone a whole new take on the Onibugyou story.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It'll have a few Birth of the Vicious Oni-related easter eggs and references too. I really can't tell you too much right now... but I hope you all go and watch it too!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Next, we have our very last song for this show, the ED for Birth of the Vicious Oni...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Kishoumon Nocturne, hope you all like it!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It is a slow song. The moment the music starts, the crowd quiets down.

The singer has already belted out an entire concert's worth of songs, the beads of sweat running down her neck just barely perceptible, but she strives to keep her breathing steady, singing to the gentle violin.
...Plot of the film aside, the song's pretty good. This 'Momo-cchi' has a great singing voice too.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Shame I don't have time for a break right now.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma turns her head towards the perimeter of the crowd.
Peering over the heads of hundreds, no, thousands of fans, she is looking to spy a target before the target spies her—
Unfortunately, at that very moment, they lock eyes.
There she is!
attributes.name: Anxious Police Officer

attributes.content: Gah!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: 'Scuse me, I need to switch places.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Eh? Wha—?
attributes.name: Young Fan

attributes.content: If you're not going to move, I'll push my way through.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I don't understand—
attributes.name: Young Fan

attributes.content: Sorry, pal.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The Oni woman lifts her 'uchiwa' up high. It is only at this point that the young fan notices the cold glint of steel shining off it.
Before he even has time to react, he is pushed aside by some monstrous force. The tall Oni has barged past him, and now she is only a few steps away from the stage.
Alone in this land, we all float on by♪
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Our fleeting tender moments, cause such deep sighs♪
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Let me forever gaze into your eyes♪
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Looking at life's dawn and dusk, so filled with dreams♪
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Thank you, everyone! Thank you all for listening!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That was the last song I have for you today—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Encore! Encore! Encore!
attributes.name: Hyped Fans

attributes.content: Momoka! Momoka! Here! Over here!
attributes.name: Kajimachi Resident

attributes.content: Amidst the surging crowd of fans, one is particularly excited. She lifts something up high, having done all she can to squeeze through the crowd to reach the stage.
Momoka! I-I live in Kajimachi, I was even an extra in Birth of the Vicious Oni.
attributes.name: Kajimachi Resident

attributes.content: This is a picture you took with us extras when we were wrapping up filming. I always wanted to give it to you, but never had the chance... Please, take it!
attributes.name: Kajimachi Resident

attributes.content: Kajimachi? You're...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Even Kajimachi has star-chasers like her these days? I thought only old geezers lived there—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: As she muses, Hoshiguma inadvertently spots out the corner of her eye several men, very much not dressed like fans, heading towards the Kajimachi girl.
They don't look like plainclothes security either. She might even say they look more like... yakuza?
Just as they are about to grab hold of her, Momoka suddenly pulls her up onto the stage.
WHOOOOOOOO! MOMOKA!
attributes.name: Passionate Fans

attributes.content: The fans, lost to hype, rush the stage, making the already-cramped venue even more impenetrable.
Up on stage, the sparkling idol cups her hands around her fan's.
I-I-I... Y-Y-You...
attributes.name: Kajimachi Resident

attributes.content: Could you tell me your name?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: R-Right! Kichisei! I'm Kichisei!
attributes.name: Kajimachi Resident

attributes.content: I'm sure I've seen you before...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You remember me? Tha—, well, wh-what did I even do that was so memorable, Momoka-san?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Hmm... This might be embarrassing, but you're the first person I've met who actually likes film set bentos...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That's because the rice is so good—Wait, wait... You saw that? No, nonono...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: I put my own on the table next to you, so I got to watch you happily eat your sixth box.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Deep bow) I'm so sorry—!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: No, please, there's no need, I just meant—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: As the girl leans forward, she loses her balance, stumbling into Momoka's embrace. Seeing her give one of her fans a big hug, the crowd goes wild.
Hey now, watch your step.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: So, how is Kajimachi right now? Is everyone doing okay?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Kajimachi... Right now, it... It...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The pachinko parlor's not seeing as much business as it used to. Most people who want to stay out of trouble have moved away, and they're shooting Shin Onibugyou in a big fancy sound stage studio...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: No, wait, what I'm trying to say is that I'm here on Kajimachi's behalf to invite you back! Everyone would love to see you again!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Eh? Really? I'll gladly go, and I'll gladly see what I can do! I'll do anything I can for Kajimachi's sake!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Whisper) Kichisei-san, security's almost here. You can leave from the side.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Whisper) Th-Thank you, Momoka-san!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: THANKS FOR THE PHOTO!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka turns to look at her backup band. The lead keyboardist gives her a nod.
Then... Thank you everyone for your passion and energy! It really means a lot to me!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: So I'd like to ask everyone to wait a little bit longer, and let the band have a moment to catch their breath.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'll be back on stage in two minutes to give you all the perfect curtain call!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The venue lights slowly fade out.
But the darkness does not stop the crowd's fervent chatter. Hoshiguma takes the opportunity to haul herself up on stage, trying to leave the venue as fast as possible.
Who just stepped on me?!
Ugh.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Who're you?
attributes.name: Dubious Man

attributes.content: (Isn't this one of the guys chasing Kichisei? Guess they really were plainclothes security.)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Just looking to head out, nothing else. It's too crowded down there.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Don't you fans pay a lot of money to be in a crowd like that?
attributes.name: Dubious Man

attributes.content: Wait, I bet you're the type of messed-up fan who goes onstage to bother the talent!
attributes.name: Dubious Man

attributes.content: I really am just trying to head out—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You really didn't check who's in charge of Momoka-san's agency?! Stay right there!
attributes.name: Dubious Man

attributes.content: Hey, what the—?! The hell is this thing... A metal shield?!
attributes.name: Dubious Man

attributes.content: Report, we've got trouble! There's someone on the stage—
attributes.name: Dubious Man

attributes.content: Going to have to ask you to shut it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I need to get out of here quick. If I end up chased by both security and the police—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I'm coming back on stage now, thank you everyone for waiting—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The lights turn on.
The two people up on stage look at each other with surprise, an unconscious man slumped on the floor between them.
An Oni with... a single horn?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: From the legend? The 'Nameless Oni' kaidan legend?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Eek! G-Get back! Don't haunt me!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Stay away from meeeeeee!!!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: As the crowd looks on, the one-horned Oni turns towards backstage, while Momoka huddles against the floor, shielding her head with her hands.
The lighting director cuts the lights, but it's no use. It only takes five seconds of silence before the venue devolves into complete bedlam.
*phew*... Finally got out of there.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Even if you account for the chaos, the encore should be over by now. The police will be on my trail soon enough.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Should I go meet them?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No, I should at least head back to Kajimachi first to see the old man. Who knows how much the place has changed in twenty years.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ding, dong, ding, Lingones Department Store♪
attributes.name: Repeating Broadcast

attributes.content: Everything you want, you'll find it here, Lingones Department Store♪
attributes.name: Repeating Broadcast

attributes.content: (...Lingones Department Store? Wasn't it called Yamazakiya?)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: (Did they extend the store so much it blocked the road?)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: (Looks like I need to go inside to pass through.)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why don't you come in for a drink? You look like you can handle your liquor, and we just got some high-quality whiskey—
attributes.name: Eager Staff

attributes.content: Or if you would prefer a more old-school choice, we also have a fine collection of imo shochu...
attributes.name: Eager Staff

attributes.content: No thank you.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: (Behind the store, there should be—)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: (Blocked up too?)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Take this, ojou-san.
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: No need.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No, you definitely need it. You need to be guided to the most precious thing on Terra, the stepping stone to 'happiness'.
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: A flier for a host club? I definitely don't need this.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ah, whatever, it just seemed like you were looking for something. Anything I can help with?
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: What did you happen to lose here in this bustling street of entertainment?
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: The way home.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I never expected valiant ladies like you to have days when they were lost. But no matter—
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: Were all the alleys from Nita Street to Kajimachi blocked off? Can you only go using the main road now?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No need to be so hasty in going back—
attributes.name: Fashionable Man

attributes.content: Looks like there wasn't any point in asking.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: They're still scanning the crowd... They haven't seen me yet.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma finds a perfectly unremarkable wall to sit down against. True enough, two police officers keep their eyes on the crowd, walking right past her without a second glance.

Most of the credit goes to the people she is sharing the wall with, a majority of them drunken office workers. Some of them lean against the wall to vomit, while others simply hunch over to puke onto the street.

As for those who want to entertain themselves in the entertainment district through means outside of alcohol, they appear as if on an infinite conveyor belt, a near-infinite supply of them on an endless loop.
She is pretty sure she saw this group of people walk past her not five minutes ago.
Just about time to go.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Taishou, that one-horned Oni... Are you sure she isn't the kaidan from the legend here to haunt me?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The kaidan from the tales aren't like the ghosts you're thinking of, relax.
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: B-But what else could that have been? A ghost is the only explanation...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: If she was a ghost, why'd she run off without you doing anything?
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: Hmm...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: If she didn't follow you, then the only explanation is pure coincidence. She's got nothing to do with you.
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: You're better off worrying about other things. From what you said, Mio-san would have to take responsibility for the big ruckus today.
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: Mio-san? No, her job is to keep me safe, and I'm fine, at least.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Anyway, just in case the ghost is real... It's not like anyone upstairs can blame her for failing to stop a ghost, right?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: *sigh*
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: Here. Your chikuwa, daikon, and burdenbeast tendon.
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: The radiant Momoka on stage is now just a young woman venting her frustrations, sniffling back tears before using one hand to lift her mask...
And her other to bring a bamboo skewer to her mouth, biting off a chunk of chikuwa to chew on.
Phew.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'm still scared, Taishou—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (I'll wait here at this yatai for a bit.)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: (...Smells good.)
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Taishou, I'll have a boiled fowlbeast egg, a piece of atsu-age, and a kombu knot.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Coming right up.
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: I just need to head that way to get to Kajimachi, right?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: That's right. Got work there, okyaku-sama?
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: Just dropping by for a visit—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: YOU! YOU'RE THAT—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Taishou! Look! Sh-She really did follow me!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Well—
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: I'm begging you, please don't haunt me, ghost-san! When I was playing you, I really really REALLY did my best! If you're not happy with my performance, I can ask for a reshoot—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Wait, no! The film's already out, it's too late for that!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'm actually really scared of kaidan, ghost-san! I didn't mean to offend you!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Who's shouting? Is something going on over there?
attributes.name: Target-Seeking Police Officer

attributes.content: You really led us on a wild fowlbeast chase, Hoshiguma-san. Still going to resist arrest?
attributes.name: Target-Seeking Police Officer

attributes.content: Hardly. I wasn't planning on resisting in the first place.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hands where I can see them.
attributes.name: Target-Seeking Police Officer

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What just happened?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What do you mean, 'what just happened'?
attributes.name: Yatai Vendor

attributes.content: I must be dreaming...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Why did the police just... arrest the ghost?
attributes.name: Momoka
